    Hellsing Deluxe Hardcover Volumes

    Shipping calculated at checkout.
    Sale price: $44.99 Regular price: $49.99
    %3Cp%3EEarn%20[points_amount]%20when%20you%20buy%20this%20item.%3C/p%3E

    Collects Hellsing volumes 1 to 4.

    Collects Hellsing volumes 5 to 8.

    Collects Hellsing volumes 8 to 10, plus extras from volumes 1 to 10.

    Now Shipping!

    The international hit manga series Hellsing, by Kohta Hirano, collects this action-horror epic for the first time in three original 7 inch x 10 inch deluxe hardcover volumes.

    With supernatural horrors haunting the streets and preying upon humanity, the shadowy Hellsing Organization fights back against hell's minions. Hellsing's secret weapon: the vampire lord Alucard, whose terrifying powers are needed more than ever as an army of the undead marches on London beneath the banner of the swastika!

    Take part in the apocalyptic war between vampires, werewolves, fanatics, and mercenaries. The champions of light and darkness face off across three volumes in this Deluxe Hardcover Collection of Hellsing!

    *For descriptions of each HC Volume, please visit Dark Horse Comics.

    Details and Dimensions
    Customer Ship Window: Now Shipping!*
    Writer: Kohta Hirano
    Artist: Kohta Hirano
    Translators: Duane Johnson
    Cover Information: Foil Stamping, Faux Leather
    Product Packaging Size: Length: 12” (304.8mm)
    Width: 9” (228.6mm)
    Height: 3” (76.2mm)**
    Product and Packaging Dimensional Weight: 5 lbs. (2.27 kg)**

    Cancellation Policy

    *Ship dates are approximate and subject to change.

    *International Customers are responsible for all customs duties, taxes, and fees as per the requirement of their local Customs Office.

    *Item shown is a prototype; final product may differ slightly in appearance.

    *This item is only available to ship to certain countries.

    **Size and weight are approximate values and are subject to change.

    HELLSING DELUXE EDITION
    © KOHTA HIRANO 2024
    Originally published in Japan in 1998 (vol. 1), 1999 (vol. 2) 2001 (vol. 3-4), 2003 (vol. 5-6), 2004 (vol. 7), 2006 (vol. 8), 2007 (vol. 9), 2009 (vol. 10) by SHONENGAHOSHA Co., Ltd., TOKYO.
    English translation rights arranged with SHONENGAHOSHA Co., Ltd., TOKYO through TOHAN CORPORATION, TOKYO.
    Dark Horse Direct® is a registered trademark of Dark Horse Comics LLC. Dark Horse is part of Embracer Group. All rights reserved.
